title: Thailand Escape: Bangkok Temples, Pattaya Beaches
description: Enjoy a perfect 5-day Bangkok & Pattaya getaway combining tropical beaches, cultural highlights, and city exploration. Relax in Pattaya, explore vibrant nightlife, and experience the beauty of Coral Island (Koh Larn) with crystal-clear waters and optional water activities. Discover Bangkok’s iconic temples, enjoy world-class shopping, local markets, and rooftop city views. This tour offers a memorable blend of relaxation, culture, and adventure, leaving you with lasting memories of Thailand’s charm and hospitality.
highlights: Arrival in Bangkok & transfer to Pattaya
Leisure time at Pattaya Beach & optional Walking Street visit
Coral Island (Koh Larn) speedboat tour with lunch
Optional water activities in crystal-clear waters
Visit Golden Buddha (Wat Traimit) & Reclining Buddha (Wat Pho)
inclusions: Guided Bangkok city & temple tour with iconic landmarks
Excursion to Coral Island (Koh Larn) with speedboat transfer
All sightseeing tours and transfers in air-conditioned comfort
Travel support and assistance throughout the tour
Personalized itinerary planning and guidance by Zeo Tourism
exclusions: Meals, beverages, snacks, and refreshments not explicitly mentioned in the Package Includes section, including minibar consumption and specialty dining experiences
Costs related to optional tours, experiences, adventure activities, or any services arranged independently by the guest during the tour
Any personal transfers, private transportation arrangements, extended waiting or halting charges, or deviations from the scheduled itinerary
Entrance fees, camera or video charges, and special permits unless clearly stated as included
Any expenses arising from unforeseen circumstances such as flight delays, natural events, weather conditions, government regulations, or factors beyond the control of the tour operator
Any service, activity, or expense not specifically listed under the Package Includes, whether of personal preference or incidental nature

All expenses of a personal nature, including but not limited to laundry services, telephone and internet usage, room service, gratuities, shopping, and any other incidental costs incurred during the journey

itinerary.title: Arrival in Bangkok | Transfer to Pattaya
itinerary.description:
Upon arrival at Bangkok Airport, you will be warmly welcomed and guided toward your vehicle. From here, you begin your scenic journey to Pattaya, a vibrant coastal city located about two hours from Bangkok. Along the way, you may catch glimpses of Thai countryside, bustling roadways, and the gradual shift from cityscapes to ocean views.
Once you reach Pattaya, you check into your hotel and unwind after your travels. The afternoon is at leisure, perfect for relaxing or strolling along the beach. As the sun sets, the city begins to glow with lights. You may choose to explore the buzzing nightlife of walking street, or simply enjoy a quiet dinner by the seaside.

itinerary.title: Half – day Coral Island Tour with Lunch
itinerary.description:
After breakfast, your day begin with an exciting speedboat ride to Coral Island also known as Koh Larn, one of the most beautiful islands near Pattaya. The journey over crystal-clear water is exhilarating and soon you are greeted by soft white sand, gentle waves and clear blue skies.

At the island, you can relax on the beach or take part in optional water activities like parasailing, snorkeling or jet skiing. The underwater world here is captivating, with coral reefs and colorful marine life visible even in shallow water. A delicious Thai lunch is served at a beachside restaurant, offering local flavors with a view of the sea.
You return to Pattaya in the afternoon with time to relax or explore more on your own.

itinerary.title: Transfer to Bangkok and Half- day Bangkok city tour
itinerary.description:
After breakfast and check-out, you travel back to Bangkok. Upon arrival, your half day city tour begins, taking you through some od the city’s most iconic and sacred sites.
You visit Wat Traimit, home to the Golden Buddha- a solid gold statue that gleams under temple
lights. Next is Wat Pho, where the massive Reclining Buddha lies in serene majesty, and the temple grounds are filled with chedis and intricate murals. Optionally, you may also stop by Wat Arun or the Grand Place area for a photo stop or short walk.

As you make your way through the city, you pass vibrant neighborhoods, royal ground and riverside temple. After the tour, you check in at Bangkok hotel and can spend the evening as you like perhaps shopping, enjoy Thai street food, or relaxing with spa treatment.

itinerary.title: Free Day for shopping and exploring the city
itinerary.description:
Today is you to explore Bangkok at your own pace. This dynamic city offers something for every kind of traveler. You might begin your day with visit to Siam Paragon or MBK Center two of the city’s largest shopping malls filled with fashion, electronics and local brands.
If you are looking for something more traditional you could explore the Chatuchak Weekend Market or take a boat to a nearby floating market where wooden boats glide by, piled high with tropical fruits, Thai snacks, and handicrafts.
Bangkok’s culture side is also worth exploring – art galleries, traditional Thai houses, and tranquil parks are scattered throughout the city. In the evening, consider visiting a sky bar like Mahanakhon Skywalk, where panoramic views of Bangkok stretch far into the distance under a glowing sunset.

itinerary.title: Transfer to Bangkok airport for Departure
itinerary.description:
After breakfast, it’s time to check out. Depending on your flight time, you might squeeze in some last-minute shopping or enjoy a quiet morning coffee while watching the city stir awake. Your private transfer will take you to the airport, concluding your memorable journey through Thailand.
As you head home, you carry with memories of serene temple, tropical islands, flavorful cuisine, and the warm hospitality that Thailand is known for.
